listingMetadata.websiteDescription: Studio website and Vault Member portal. Auth, rank system, points economy, classified lore, Discord role sync, Stripe subscriptions, admin panel.

intelligence.currentFocus: Session 84 closed out: 7 S80 Tier 2/3/4 items shipped at quality bar across two `/go` rounds. Offline page redesigned (vault-forge aesthetic with SVG vault-lock sigil, Georgia SEALED wordmark, aria-live network pill). Investor action logging gated behind GDPR opt-in consent (first-login banner + profile-page toggle). /social/ dashboard page live — reads public-intelligence.social, groups handles honestly (Live / Limited / Reserved). Personalized returning-visitor welcome band on homepage reading VSIntentState (branches on journey_stage x world_affinity x trust_level). Studio nav dropdown propagated across 79 HTML files — /social/ + /press/ now first-class nav destinations. Dynamic hero spotlight between hero sub-copy and CTAs showing highest-progress SPARKED or FORGE title. PWA push opt-in prompt on /studio-pulse/ + /vault-wall/ + /changelog/ deep-linking to #push anchor in portal. Two items still HAR-deferred (unchanged from S83): Ask IGNIS (ANTHROPIC_API_KEY) + 3-item edge-gate/CSP-nonce/rate-limit bundle (CF_WORKER_API_TOKEN).
intelligence.nextMilestone: Watch first post-push Lighthouse + playwright-axe runs (now also exercising S84's 79-file nav propagation against the tightened budgets + dual-URL gate from S82/S83). Then next pickups: extract `public-intelligence.social` into the shared `website-public` contract for Studio Hub consumption (zero-risk cohesion win); ship category-aware send-push edge function + push_preferences column to close the second half of S80 Tier 4 push item. ETERNAL tier vocabulary remains a founder-only CANON decision. CF_WORKER_API_TOKEN still the highest-leverage single founder action (unlocks 3 Tier 1 items).
